body:
yourlittleangel15:

when she knows you’re close, so she starts using that condescending tone, asking you questions she already knows the answers to, just to hear you struggle to find your words as you fall apart for her.

Is that all it takes to make you fall apart sweet girl? You can’t even answer me properly, can you? You gonna cum for me baby?
